Baseus Enerfill 70W 3-port USB-C charger

Buy for $25 (Reg. $40)

What we love

Baseus’ Enerfill 70W charger is a compact travel-friendly option capable of powering a laptop, phone, and smaller accessories from one wall outlet. It features two USB-C ports and a USB-A port, and it can deliver enough power for a MacBook Air or similarly-specced notebook. Its foldable prongs also help keep the charger compact and easier to slip into a bag.

items.title: Here are the five new LEGO sets releasing in July 2026 from Technic, Icons, Marvel and Star Wars themes
items.summary: Prime Day has come and passed, and now LEGO builders are getting ready for a new wave of building sets releasing on July 1, 2026. As we’ve seen in past years, July is a more low-key month of releases, with only five new sets hitting the market this time around – with the Technic theme dominating the list, while we’re also seeing some new Icons, Marvel, and Star Wars sets, too. Head below to check out the full lineup of new LEGO sets releasing in July 2026.

items.title: Trump's plan to redesign every .gov website leads to AI-designed horrors
items.summary: A year in, National Design Studio delays plan to update government web standards.

items.title: Ninja’s Crispi Pro 6-in-1 glass cooker retains Prime Day pricing to $250 2026 low, more from $158
items.summary: Amazon is retaining the Prime Day pricing on the Ninja Crispi Pro 6-in-1 Glass Air Fryer down at $249.95 shipped, matching the price we’re seeing 5-in-1 Crispi model at $176, down from $220. There’s also a large number of Ninja’s other deals on appliances, coolers, and more in the official Amazon storefront here.

items.title: Satechi’s Space Black metal 25W 3-in-1 Qi2 MagSafe Stand just dropped back to Prime all-time low pricing
items.summary: One of the more notable all-time lows Satechi’s latest 2026 model. The sleek Space Black metal stand jumped back up in price before the 4-day event even ended, but the deal at 20% off has returned once again.

items.title: I own a couple of Tribit speakers and love them, grab this model for summer while it’s $21
items.summary:
Tribit PocketGo Bluetooth Speaker

Buy for $21 (Reg. $25)

What we love

I love little speakers like this, and in fact I’ve got a couple of Tribit models I use regularly. One I keep out by my hot tub year round (even during the past winter) and it has still held up like a champ. This offering is only $21 Prime shipped right now, and well worth the cash if you want to play music while at the beach, knocking out projects, and more.

items.title: This affordable kit hides 8 feet of cords for only $8 Prime shipped
items.summary:
Delamu 8-Foot 3-Cord Cover Kit

Buy for $8 (Reg. $13)

Clip the on-page 10% off coupon. Prime-exclusive discount.

What we love

Yesterday we published a large cord cover kit that’s more than double this size in terms of length, but not everyone needs or wants that much. Thankfully today’s solution hides 2-3 cables for more the 8 feet and stacking discounts leads to price of just $8 Prime shipped.

items.title: Top off everything from car tires to basketballs with this portable 160 PSI air compressor down at $25 (Reg. $60)
items.summary:
GOOLOO A6 Gear 160 PSI Portable Air Compressor

Buy for $25 (Reg. $60)

What we love

Some of the more affordable portable tire inflators cannot handle cars or anything more than an average bike. That’s not the case here, with a solution that’s ready to handle “up to 160 PSI.” The price is quite competitive too at just $25 Prime shipped.

items.title: Almost 60,000 far-right extremists in Germany, intelligence agency says
items.summary: More than a quarter of those identified are believed to be violent, Germany's domestic intelligence agency says.

items.title: Blue Origin still doesn’t know why its New Glenn rocket blew up last month
items.summary: But the company is still claiming that New Glenn will return to flight this year.

items.title: Take your entire Switch 2 setup to the next family or friend hangout with this case, now $19
items.summary:
JSAUX Nintendo Switch 2 Full Travel Case

Buy for $19 (Reg. $22)

What we love

If you want to be known as the person that brings the fun to family and friend hangouts, a case like this is certainly worth picking up. I can personally attest that at family gatherings taking a Nintendo console along has been a great way to get people laughing and having a good time.

items.title: Whisker retains Prime Day pricing on Litter-Robot bundles for July 4th – deals start from $599
items.summary: Whisker has shifted over into its July 4th Litter-Robot Sale with savings on the large array of bundle options for various models. While we’re no longer seeing the standard Litter-Robot EVO getting the Prime Day discount, its 3-year warranty bundle is the next-best price keeping down at $599 shipped. Normally, this bundle (which extends the standard 1-year warranty to three years) would run you $699 at full price, which we first saw drop down to this rate during last week’s Prime Day promotions. It’s continuing now through America’s birthday, giving you $100 savings for the all-time lowest price we have tracked. Head below to browse the full lineup of offers while they last.

items.title: Tuesday Apple TV deals from $2: Super Mario bundle, Jurassic World, Wizarding World 11-film collection, Star Wars, more
items.summary: As is typically the case on Tuesdays, we have a jam-packed lineup of Apple TV deals, including The Super Mario Bros. Movie & Mario Galaxy Movie Collection, Mortal Kombat 2-Film Collection, Jaws 3-Movie Collection, Jurassic World 7-Movie Collection, Wizarding World 11-Film Collection, Lost Complete Series, Cowboy Bebop Complete Series, and the Star Wars: The Skywalker Saga 9-Movie Collection, and more. On your way down scope out the Best Buy annual 4th of July sale, these M5 Pro MacBook Pro configs you can still land at $450 off, pre-price hike deals on M5 iPad Pro up to $350 off, and these official Apple Watch Sport Bands at $15 Prime shipped. The movies and shows await below.

items.title: Nike sale upgrades your summer kicks from $26
items.summary: Today we went specifically on a hunt for the summer-friendly kicks that Nike currently has on sale. Highlights that we found range from the affordable Marina Slides to the Kobe Offcourt Slides, ReactX Rejuven8 SE, and more. Just note that you can also score this 20-card carbon fiber wallet down at $20, easy-to-clean shoes at $22, and much more in our apparel guide. Head below to see our top Nike picks.

items.title: Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Remastered comes to Switch 2 this August on a proper game card
items.summary: After years of leaks Bethesda finally shadow dropped the Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Remastered on PC, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X|S in mid 2025, and after receiving its fair share of rumors, we now have an official release date for the Switch 2 edition.

items.title: Flat design with foldable AC headlines this 45W USB-C wall charger for only $10 (Save 38%)
items.summary:
TESSAN 45W Flat USB-C Wall Charger

Buy for $10 (Reg. $16)

What we love

Wall chargers continue to get smaller and smaller, but most of them still just out from the wall and once the cable is plugged in, it sticks out even further. That’s why I often prefer flat solutions like this. Best of all, this offering is only $10 Prime shipped right now and its Type-C port can reach 45W.

The move is clearly a reaction to the cyberattack and data breach that occurred last Saturday. To recap, the MOH main page went down […]

According to reports, the outage extends to different apps which integrate the system, which include the state’s own Smart Selangor Parking and Nine, as […]
